content: Backend feedparser + core/news_feed.py (RSS curated 7 sources, keyword filter, dedup, 7-day TTL) ✅
Backend bot_config schema étendu avec news_feed (enabled_for, interval, feeds, keywords, headlines_per_post, last_refresh_*) ✅
Backend bot_scheduler : cron job 4×/jour news_refresh enregistré ✅
Backend prophet_studio + bots router : preview accepte keywords[] + use_news_context, news_block injecté en extra_context ✅
Frontend AdminBots Config : section News Feed complète (toggles X/TG, interval, headlines, RSS editor, keywords editor, refresh, preview list) ✅
Frontend AdminBots Preview : Prophet inspiration block (keywords input + use-news-context toggle) ✅
Test E2E ✅ · Prophet génère tweet avec keywords + news context (FR 160/270 + EN 150/270 sous budget, hashtags auto)
